response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Partially matches. The provided reference lyrics contained errors (e.g., '本音' instead of '方向') which were corrected based on on-screen text and audio. The reference also lacked the middle/later sections of the song and the post-performance talk segment, which were manually transcribed and translated. 2. JSON Usage: The JSON was used as a base reference but mostly supplemented with manual transcription and translation to ensure complete coverage. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were accurately mapped to the vocal cues of both the song and the spoken talk segment. Silence was respected by outputting no subtitles during instrumental sections.

subtitles.original: その精一杯じゃ うまく笑えない
subtitles.english: With just that level of effort, I can't smile well,

subtitles.original: だけどそれ以上に
subtitles.english: But even more than that,

subtitles.original: 世界は優しくて
subtitles.english: the world is kind.

subtitles.original: いつか風が生まれた
subtitles.english: Someday the wind was born,

subtitles.original: 足跡が始まる場所
subtitles.english: the place where footprints begin.

subtitles.original: あの日の荷物抱えて
subtitles.english: Carrying that day's baggage,

subtitles.original: 駆け出したとしても ここに来るんだろう
subtitles.english: even if I run out, I'll probably end up here.

subtitles.original: この景色も この声も
subtitles.english: This scenery, and this voice too,

subtitles.original: 私を彩るすべて
subtitles.english: everything that colors me.

subtitles.original: 方向なんてまだわからないけど
subtitles.english: I don't know which way to go yet, but

subtitles.original: ただ風の吹くままに
subtitles.english: I'll just blow with the wind.

subtitles.original: ねぇ いつから気づいていたの
subtitles.english: Hey, when did you start to notice?

subtitles.original: まるで私のこと全部お見通しで
subtitles.english: It's as if you can see right through me.

subtitles.original: 苦し紛れにごまかした嘘も
subtitles.english: Even the desperate lies I made up,

subtitles.original: 君にはバレていたのかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if you saw through them all.

subtitles.original: 平凡で 退屈で あくび混じりで
subtitles.english: Ordinary, boring, and filled with yawns,

subtitles.original: 変哲のない ありふれてる時間
subtitles.english: this is just an ordinary, common time.

subtitles.original: 想像しただけじゃ何も変わらない
subtitles.english: Just imagining things won't change a thing.

subtitles.original: だけどそれ以上に
subtitles.english: But even more than that,

subtitles.original: 予測してた以上に ほら
subtitles.english: look, even more than I predicted...

subtitles.original: 新しい風が吹き抜けていって
subtitles.english: A new wind starts to blow through,

subtitles.original: 不器用な自分がやけに愛しく思えたんだ
subtitles.english: making my clumsy self seem strangely endearing.

subtitles.original: いつか風が止んで
subtitles.english: Someday when the wind stops,

subtitles.original: 足跡が途切れた場所
subtitles.english: and the footprints fade away,

subtitles.original: 落とし物探して 拾って
subtitles.english: I'll search for what was lost, pick it up,

subtitles.original: 見つけ出せたから ここにいるんだろう
subtitles.english: and because I found it, I must be here.

subtitles.original: そっと 髪がなびく
subtitles.english: Gently, my hair flutters.

subtitles.original: いつか風が夢見た
subtitles.english: Someday the wind dreamed of

subtitles.original: 青空と交わる場所
subtitles.english: the place where it meets the blue sky.

subtitles.original: 回り道選んで 迷って 躓いたとしても
subtitles.english: Even if I take detours, get lost, and stumble,

subtitles.original: そこへ行くんだろう
subtitles.english: I'll still make my way there.

subtitles.original: この景色も この声も
subtitles.english: This scenery, and this voice too,

subtitles.original: 私を彩るすべて
subtitles.english: everything that colors me.

subtitles.original: 等身大の手で握りしめて
subtitles.english: Holding tight with my true, down-to-earth hands.

subtitles.original: 想像以上にもっと自由な速度で
subtitles.english: At a speed more free than I ever imagined.

subtitles.original: 方向なんてまだわからないけど
subtitles.english: I don't know which way to go yet, but

subtitles.original: ただ風 of 吹くままに
subtitles.english: I'll just blow with the wind.

subtitles.original: はい！というわけで、ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Alright! And with that, thank you very much!

subtitles.original: よいしょ。みんな、すっかり忘れてると思うけど...
subtitles.english: Oof. I think everyone has completely forgotten, but...

subtitles.original: 今日、これから記念撮影します！
subtitles.english: we are going to take a commemorative photo now!

subtitles.original: そう、お土産があるって言ったっしょ？
subtitles.english: That's right, I told you there would be souvenirs, right?

subtitles.original: これ、これ。いや、ちょっと待って。マジで自撮り棒...
subtitles.english: This, this. Wait a second, seriously, this selfie stick...

subtitles.original: これ、リハーサルでめっちゃ練習したのに...
subtitles.english: I practiced this so much during rehearsals...

subtitles.original: 自撮り棒下手。
subtitles.english: but I'm so bad at using a selfie stick.

subtitles.original: あ、いい感じいい感じ。
subtitles.english: Ah, this looks good, looks good.

subtitles.original: カシャッ。
subtitles.english: Click.

subtitles.original: よし、いけてそういけてそう。
subtitles.english: Okay, looks like it worked, looks like it worked.

subtitles.original: おっけー。
subtitles.english: Okay!

subtitles.original: はい、というわけで、皆さん。今日「お土産あり」って言いましたね？
subtitles.english: So, everyone. I did say there would be souvenirs today, right?

subtitles.original: そうなんです。
subtitles.english: That's right!

subtitles.original: 今日撮った、今この風真がね、自撮り棒で撮った写真が...
subtitles.english: The photo that I, Kazama, just took with the selfie stick...

subtitles.original: コンビニで、なんとプリントアウトできます！
subtitles.english: can actually be printed out at convenience stores!

subtitles.original: すごーい！
subtitles.english: Amazing!

subtitles.original: はい、こちらですね、対象店舗ファミリーマートさん、ローソンさん、ミニストップさんで
subtitles.english: Yes, this is available at FamilyMart, Lawson, and Ministop,

subtitles.original: 本日21時から、ネットで事前購入ができます！
subtitles.english: and you can purchase it online in advance starting today at 9:00 PM!

subtitles.original: お値段がですね、税込み300円とのことで、
subtitles.english: The price is 300 yen (including tax),

subtitles.original: 印刷できるのは、明日の6月19日、20時までになっております。
subtitles.english: and you can print it until tomorrow, June 19th, at 8:00 PM.

subtitles.original: 写真にはですね、複製手書きメッセージ、あの、この後書きますんで。
subtitles.english: On the photo, I'll be writing a printed handwritten message after this.

subtitles.original: どんな写真が撮れているか、ちょっと写真下手くそでも怒らないでね？
subtitles.english: As for what kind of photo we got, please don't be mad if my photography skills are bad!

subtitles.original: 内容は買ってから確認してください！
subtitles.english: Please check the photo after you buy it!

subtitles.original: いや、すごいよね。ちょっといち早く皆さんのもとに、手元に残るライブのお土産が用意できればということで、
subtitles.english: It's amazing, isn't it? I wanted to get a physical souvenir from the live show to you as quickly as possible,

subtitles.original: 今回やらせていただきました。お土産あります！
subtitles.english: so that's why we did this. We have souvenirs!
